summary: RTI applications filed to obtain public-interest data used in this project. Each entry includes the authority, subject, filing date, current status, and any response received.

filings.subject: Complete affidavit data for all 294 West Bengal assembly candidates — 2021 election
filings.notes: ECI confirmed all affidavits are available on myneta.info and eci.gov.in. Directed to public portal.

filings.subject: List of sitting West Bengal MLAs with active CBI charge-sheets as of 2025
filings.notes: CBI provided a list of 22 individuals with charge-sheets. Names matched against MLA list.

filings.subject: PMLA cases registered against elected representatives in West Bengal (2019–2025)
filings.notes: ED confirmed 14 MLAs under PMLA proceedings. Partial names provided; full list withheld citing Section 8(1)(h).

filings.subject: Constituency-wise MPLAD / MLA LAD fund utilisation 2021–2024
filings.notes: Initial response was incomplete — only 47 of 294 constituencies covered. First appeal filed 2025-12-10.

filings.authority: State Bank of India (Electoral Bonds Cell)
filings.subject: Denomination-wise electoral bond issuance data: West Bengal purchasers 2019–2024
filings.notes: Rejected citing RBI confidentiality provisions. Supreme Court order data (Feb 2024) used as primary source instead.

filings.subject: Voter roll anomalies — deletions and additions in 10 flagged constituencies between 2021 and 2026 rolls
filings.notes: 30-day response deadline: 2026-02-07. No response received as of filing date.

filings.subject: FIR count and disposal rate for political violence cases: 2021 post-poll, constituency-wise
Elected representative crime data — West Bengal, breakdown by IPC section
